# YouTube Travel Videos Metadata Index

This dataset contains structured metadata for 2,267 travel-related YouTube videos published by the Samuel & Audrey Media Network.

Canonical dataset:
https://huggingface.co/datasets/samuelandaudreymedianetwork/youtube-travel-videos-metadata-index

Zenodo DOI:
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.18665662

Recommended files:
- youtube-travel-videos-metadata.jsonl
- youtube-travel-videos-metadata.csv
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md
- SCHEMA.json
- CITATION.cff

Records:
- 2,267 youtube_video_metadata records

License:
CC BY-NC 4.0

Contact:
nomadicsamuel@gmail.com
